visual_description: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and blue eyes looks upward, her mouth slightly open. A man with glasses, wearing a suit and tie, gazes slightly to his right with a neutral expression. Both are indoors, with the woman near a window and the man seated against a muted green wall.
